clauses.text: This Agreement is entered into between [CLIENT_NAME] ("Client") and [PROVIDER_NAME] ("Service Provider").
This Agreement governs the provision of [PROJECT_NAME] by the Service Provider to the Client.
The Service Provider shall produce the music video described in [SERVICES_CONTRACTED] for the song [SONG_TITLE] on [PRODUCTION_DATES].
The Client shall pay the Service Provider [TOTAL_VALUE] for the Services, payable via [PAYMENT_METHOD] according to the schedule agreed between the Parties.
If the Client fails to pay any amount due by its due date, the Service Provider may charge interest on the overdue amount at [LATE_PAYMENT_RATE] per month.
The Service Provider retains copyright in the Deliverables. Upon full payment of [TOTAL_VALUE], the Client receives a [LICENSE_SCOPE] license to use the Deliverables for [PERMITTED_USE].

The creative concept for the music video shall be approved by [CREATIVE_APPROVAL_AUTHORITY] before principal filming begins. Material deviations from the approved concept during production require the approval of [CREATIVE_APPROVAL_AUTHORITY].
The Services shall be performed according to the production schedule agreed by the Parties for [PRODUCTION_DATES]. Changes to this schedule require written agreement of both Parties.
Where aerial filming is included, the Service Provider warrants that it holds any authorization required by applicable aviation regulation.

Where performers or actors appear in the Deliverables, the Client shall obtain a signed talent release from each performer authorizing use of their likeness in connection with the music video for [SONG_TITLE], and shall provide a copy to the Service Provider upon request.
The Client shall reimburse the Service Provider's reasonable, pre-approved travel expenses in addition to [TOTAL_VALUE].
Where [PRODUCTION_DATES] require overnight travel, the Client shall provide or reimburse reasonable accommodation for the Service Provider.
Where the Services include visual effects work, the Service Provider shall provide such work as described in [VFX_SCOPE] for an additional fee of [VFX_FEE].
The Client may request delivery within [RUSH_DELIVERY_PERIOD_DAYS] days, in exchange for an additional fee of [RUSH_DELIVERY_FEE].

Each Party shall keep confidential any non-public information disclosed by the other Party in connection with this Agreement and shall not disclose it without the disclosing Party's prior written consent.
Where the Client requires use of the Deliverables beyond the promotion of [SONG_TITLE], the Parties shall agree an additional license fee of [EXTENDED_LICENSE_FEE].
The Service Provider shall deliver the Deliverables to the Client on or before [DELIVERY_DATE].
The Services shall take place on [PRODUCTION_DATES] at , subject to any change confirmed in writing by both Parties.

If the Client cancels the Services more than [CANCELLATION_NOTICE_PERIOD_DAYS] days before [PRODUCTION_DATES], the Client shall forfeit [CANCELLATION_FEE_PERCENT] of [TOTAL_VALUE]. If cancellation occurs within [CANCELLATION_NOTICE_PERIOD_DAYS] days, the Client shall forfeit the full amount of [TOTAL_VALUE].
The Client may request up to [INCLUDED_REVISION_ROUNDS] rounds of revisions at no additional charge. Additional rounds shall be charged at [ADDITIONAL_REVISION_FEE] per round.

The Client warrants that it holds or has secured all rights necessary to use [SONG_TITLE] in connection with the music video produced under this Agreement. The Service Provider bears no responsibility for confirming the Client's rights in [SONG_TITLE].
The Client shall obtain any necessary permit or consent for filming at the locations used in producing the Deliverables.

Upon full payment of [TOTAL_VALUE], the Client receives a license to use the Deliverables to promote [SONG_TITLE] across all media channels. The Service Provider retains copyright in the Deliverables.
Neither Party shall be liable to the other for any indirect, incidental, or consequential loss arising from this Agreement.
Each Party's total liability arising from this Agreement shall not exceed [TOTAL_VALUE], except for loss arising from gross negligence, willful misconduct, or fraud.

Neither Party shall be liable for a failure to perform to the extent that failure results from an event beyond that Party's reasonable control affecting [PRODUCTION_DATES], including weather or venue unavailability, provided the affected Party notifies the other without undue delay.

Neither Party shall be liable for a failure to perform its obligations to the extent that failure results from an event beyond that Party's reasonable control that could not have been avoided through reasonable diligence. The affected Party shall notify the other Party without undue delay.
This Agreement shall be governed by [APPLICABLE_LAW]. Any dispute shall be submitted to [DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM] before litigation, except where interim injunctive relief is required.
The Parties have executed this Agreement as of [SIGNATURE_DATE].
